Aspiring Irish Olympic gymnasts perform routines on the asymmetric bars.

Displays of strength and control by five young gymnasts on the asymmetric bars.

Members of the Irish Olympic Gymnastics Squad perform hip circles, squat through dismounts, shoot dismounts and a voluntary beam exercise.

All five gymnasts are age 12 and include Caroline Roy, Jane Kevlin, Clodagh Conway, Fionnuala McVeigh and Suzanne Gregory.

This episode of 'Let's Go' was broadcast on 3 April 1979.

'Let's Go' was a programme featuring a miscellany of sports and leisure activities for young people. The programme was presented by Kathy Parke and John Saunders.

Sections of the seafront and Victorian promenade at Bray are in danger of collapsing into the sea.
